author: Chidera Ibe
name: L-BFGS SLOT + Entropy-Adaptive N-gram Mixer
blurb: L-BFGS SLOT (6 steps, strong Wolfe line search) combined with vectorized order-12 n-gram backoff mixer. Entropy-adaptive alpha mixes neural and n-gram probabilities per-token, with target-independent order and context-count features boosting n-gram trust for high-confidence matches. Novel: no other submission combines second-order SLOT optimization with adaptive n-gram mixing.
